source_pr.title: planner: split casetest for pushdown
source_pr.body:

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #44940

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: The PR mainly splits planner casetests for pushdown to improve CI execution; no concrete flaky failure signature is captured in the case.
failure_signature: No concrete failure signature captured (CI/test organization change).
root_cause_explanation: The diff is primarily about reorganizing/splitting casetests and adjusting CI execution (e.g., running under race config). Without a captured flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization tied to a flaky mechanism, classify as insufficient evidence rather than guessing a confirmed concurrency/data-race root cause.
fix_pattern: Split/reorganize planner casetests for CI; no clearly evidenced targeted flaky stabilization change in the case.
analysis:
PR title: planner: split casetest for pushdown
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/45478
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: build:race --config=ci
Changed files (10): .bazelrc, planner/core/casetest/BUILD.bazel, planner/core/casetest/integration_test.go, planner/core/casetest/pushdown/BUILD.bazel, planner/core/casetest/pushdown/main_test.go, planner/core/casetest/pushdown/push_down_test.go, planner/core/casetest/pushdown/testdata/integration_suite_in.json, planner/core/casetest/pushdown/testdata/integration_suite_out.json, planner/core/casetest/testdata/integration_suite_in.json, planner/core/casetest/testdata/integration_suite_out.json
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
